project.name: VVIP Addresses
project.address: Sector 12, Greater Noida West, Noida Extension, Uttar Pradesh 201318
project.description: VVIP Addresses is an premium residential development in Sector 12 featuring large-format 3 & 4 BHK ultra-luxury apartments with world-class sports facilities.
project.long_description: VVIP Addresses represents a premium signature residential community under construction in Sector 12, Noida Extension. Engineered by the highly regarded VVIP Group, the project features high-end structural G+25 high-rise towers spread over approximately 4.5 acres. The project is designed strictly for discerning end-users who prioritize volumetric space, private spacing, and sports-centric lifestyle features. Built with robust RCC frame structures, each unit boasts a large carpet area footprint, spacious wrap balconies, and premium branded sanitary fitments. The ground level features a complete car-free podium layout, directing all visitor and resident vehicular traffic directly into a secured, ventilated basement. Residents enjoy immediate access to an extensive club complex featuring swimming pools, basketball courts, and gated round-the-clock security.

builder.name: VVIP Group
builder.company_overview: VVIP Group (incorporated as Vibhor Vaibhav Infraprivate Limited) is a reputed real estate firm active in Delhi-NCR. Specializing in high-end luxury residential projects, commercial complexes, and retail centers, the developer is highly regarded for integrating premium state-of-the-art facilities with robust RCC framed engineering structures.

unit_types.name: 3 BHK Ultra (Comfort Grand)
unit_types.subtitle: Large-footprint 3 BHK with utility space
unit_types.description: Exquisite 3 BHK configuration offering a massive family lounge, master bedroom with walk-in dressing niche, and wide balconies.

unit_types.name: 4 BHK Ultra (Signature Imperial)
unit_types.subtitle: Palatial 4 BHK with private entrance foyer
unit_types.description: Imperial 4 BHK layout presenting grand room sizes, separate family dining alcoves, and private helper rooms with attached toilet.
whats_included: Fiber internet and digital automation ready

assumptions: All pricing is based on official VVIP launch directories as of Q3 2026.
GST is applicable at 5% on under-construction residential properties.

payment_plan.notes: Custom payment milestones linked with structural progress.

milestones.milestone: On structural completion of core tower

decision_profile.decision_thesis: VVIP Addresses is a signature residential destination under construction in Sector 12, offering spacious large-format premium homes with highly robust structures.
why_buy: Uncompromising Volumetric Spaces: Exclusively offers spacious 3 BHK and 4 BHK layouts starting from 2206 sqft super area.
Advanced 3-Tier Security: Features state-of-the-art smart surveillance and round-the-clock physical security gating.
Vehicle-Free Ground: Safe, green walkways dedicated entirely to children, pets, and senior citizens.
why_avoid: Niche Pricing Bracket: Starts at over ₹4.04 Cr, making it accessible to a select HNI pool only.
Long Construction Horizon: Estimated hanovers in 2029 require patience from buyers.
decision_profile.best_for: Large nuclear families, NRI wealth preservers, and corporate directors working in local business parks.
decision_profile.not_ideal_for: Budget first-time buyers seeking small apartments, or short-term speculative flippers.

buyerPersonas.headline: Prestige and Space Consolidated
reasons: Palatial configurations, large corner balconies, and top-tier sports structures.

persona_profile.family_stage: Nuclear with school children or senior dependants
persona_profile.motivation_note: Aspirational luxury purchase driven by building prestige, premium specifications, and extreme low-density layout.

recommendation_profile.primary_thesis: VVIP Addresses is an excellent under-construction choice in Sector 12, offering spacious large-format configurations and safe car-free grounds.
recommendation_profile.end_use_thesis: Perfect for families demanding spacious rooms, premium interior finishes, and sports-centric lifestyle facilities.
recommendation_profile.investment_thesis: Highly reliable capital preservation play. Premium layouts consistently outperform mid-market flats in resale values.
recommendation_profile.family_thesis: Exceptional. Safe, car-free ground podium level, massive play areas, and quick access to top schools.
recommendation_profile.investor_thesis: Recommended for yield-seeking investors wanting stable wealth preservation with reliable capital growth.
recommendation_profile.luxury_thesis: Highlights double-height grand lobbies, centralized VRF conditioning, private lift vestibules, and modular kitchen hubs.
recommendation_profile.risk_thesis: Zero risk. Axis Bank escrow verified under strict RERA guidelines.
walk_away_conditions: Strict budget constraints under Rs 3.5 Cr.
negotiation_leverage: Resale units can be leveraged against builder inventory options.
recommendation_profile.timeline_advice: Under construction. Expected handover in September 2029. Ideal sweet spot to secure current RERA rates before slab progression.
